0.text: Solitary nodule measuring 7.6 x 6 mm with slightly irregular borders and extending to the spicule in the apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe

1.text: Nonspecific calcific nodules in the right lung

2.text: Pleuroparenchymal fibroatelectatic changes causing parenchymal distortion and minimal volume loss in the right middle lobe

3.text: Pleuroparenchymal fibroatelectatic changes causing parenchymal distortion and minimal volume loss in the left upper lobe inferior lingular segment

4.text: Pleuroparenchymal fibroatelectatic changes causing parenchymal distortion and minimal volume loss in both lower lobe posterobasal segments

5.text: Pleuroparenchymal fibroatelectatic changes causing parenchymal distortion and minimal volume loss in the right lower lobe mediobasal segment
